name: Amaranth, Fig and Arugula Salad W/Sesame Dres
recipeIngredient: Cooked beans (white or red kidney variety)
recipeInstructions:
1. Warm olive oil in a 2-quart saucepan over moderate heat.
2. Add mustard seeds and stir until partially covered, toasting for about 30 seconds or until sesame seeds darken slightly.
3. Stir in amaranth until coated with oil.
4. Add vegetable stock (or water) and bring to a boil.
5. Reduce heat to low and simmer until grains are tender and liquid is absorbed, about 20 minutes.
6. Fold in cooked beans and chopped dried figs, cover, and set aside for 5 minutes.
7. Stir in parsley and season with salt and pepper.
8. For the dressing: Combine tahini, orange juice, water, and salt in a blender until smooth.
9. To serve: Place the amaranth mixture in the center of 6 plates. Garnish with toasted sesame seeds.
10. Surround each serving with salad greens (or shredded romaine) and arugula, chopped.
11. Drizzle dressing over the salad.
Serves 6. Per serving: 482 calories; 17 grams protein; 11 grams fat; 77 grams carbohydrates; 0 cholesterol; 385 milligrams sodium; 13 grams fiber. Vegan
